name: chessagine-mcp-v0.4.4
description: Connect to ChessAgine Chess Context Protocol tools, access to stockfish analysis, chess board state, analysis of themes making LLM more chess aware, get access to chessdb, and lichess games, chessboardmagic.

LICHESS_API_KEY.title: Lichess Study API Key
LICHESS_API_KEY.description: Your Lichess API token with study:read permission. Get a PAT from Lichess here https://lichess.org/account/oauth/token

LICHESS_USERNAME.title: Your Lichess Username
LICHESS_USERNAME.description: Enter your Lichess Username, to help LLM pull your games and other lichess tools

CHESSBOARD_MAGIC_PAT.title: ChessBoardMagic PAT Key
CHESSBOARD_MAGIC_PAT.description: Your ChessBoard Magic Personal Access Token (PAT) which you get from here https://chessboardmagic.com/

tools.name: get-theme-scores
tools.description: Analyze chess position themes (material, mobility, space, positional factors, king safety) for strategic evaluation from white or black perspective.

tools.name: analyze-variation-themes
tools.description: Track how chess themes evolve across a sequence of moves, showing positional changes and strategic developments in variations.

tools.name: get-theme-progression
tools.description: Monitor the progression of a specific chess theme (material/mobility/space/positional/king safety) throughout a variation of moves.

tools.name: compare-variations
tools.description: Compare multiple chess variations side-by-side, analyzing theme changes and strategic differences to identify the strongest continuation.

tools.name: find-critical-moments
tools.description: Identify key moves in a variation where significant theme changes occur, highlighting turning points and critical decision moments.

tools.name: get-stockfish-analysis
tools.description: Perform deep Stockfish engine analysis of any chess position, providing best moves, evaluation scores, principal variations, and strategic reasoning.

tools.name: get-best-move
tools.description: Analyze a position and get best move

tools.name: is-legal-move
tools.description: Verify if a proposed move is legal in the given chess position, ensuring move validation before analysis or gameplay.

tools.name: boardstate-to-prompt
tools.description: Generate detailed text description of a chess position after a move, converting board state into natural language for analysis and discussion.

tools.name: get-chess-knowledgebase
tools.description: Access comprehensive chess knowledge including Silman's imbalances, Fine's principles, endgame theory, and practical improvement checklists.

tools.name: get-lichess-master-games
tools.description: Retrieve master-level games and opening statistics from Lichess database for any position, including win rates and popular continuations.

tools.name: get-lichess-games
tools.description: Fetch regular Lichess user games and opening statistics, providing insights into how positions are played at various skill levels.

tools.name: get-chessdb-analysis
tools.description: Query ChessDB for position analysis with candidate moves, evaluations, win rates, and move quality ratings from extensive game databases.

tools.name: generate-chess-board-view-artificat-using-html
tools.description: Renders chess board in HTML

tools.name: generate-dynamic-gameview-html
tools.description: Render dynamic chess game

tools.name: fetch-chess-puzzle
tools.description: Fetches puzzles from Lichess puzzle database, can query by theme or rating

tools.name: get-puzzle-themes
tools.description: gets the puzzle themes

tools.name: fetch-user-recent-games-from-lichess
tools.description: Fetch 20 recent games from Lichess

tools.name: fetch-lichess-game
tools.description: fetch a single lichess game

tools.name: generate-game-review
tools.description: Generate detailed game review dashboard or text version using theme stats

prompts.name: chessagine-mode
prompts.description: Activate ChessAgine: Advanced chess analysis with engine integration
prompts.text: Activate ChessAgine mode for advanced chess analysis

prompts.name: annotation-expert
prompts.description: Become a chess annotation expert for game commentary
prompts.text: Activate annotation expert mode for professional game commentary

prompts.name: dashboard-designer
prompts.description: Create beautiful chess dashboards and visualizations
prompts.text: Activate dashboard designer mode for chess visualizations

prompts.name: analyze-position
prompts.description: Comprehensive position analysis using chess principles
prompts.text: Analyze this chess position from ${arguments.side}'s perspective: ${arguments.fen}

prompts.name: find-tactics
prompts.description: Search for tactical opportunities in a position
prompts.text: Find all tactical opportunities for ${arguments.side} in position: ${arguments.fen}

prompts.name: opening-analysis
prompts.description: Analyze opening position and suggest plans
prompts.text: Analyze this opening position and provide strategic plans: ${arguments.fen}

prompts.name: endgame-analysis
prompts.description: Analyze endgame position with technique guidance
prompts.text: Analyze this endgame position and provide winning/drawing technique: ${arguments.fen}

prompts.name: annotate-game
prompts.description: Create detailed annotations for a chess game
prompts.text: Annotate this chess game with detailed commentary: ${arguments.pgn}

prompts.name: compare-games
prompts.description: Compare two games to find patterns
prompts.text: Compare these two chess games and analyze patterns: Game 1: ${arguments.pgn1}, Game 2: ${arguments.pgn2}

prompts.name: explain-mistake
prompts.description: Deep dive into why a move was a mistake
prompts.text: Explain why ${arguments.move} was a mistake in position ${arguments.fen}. Best move: ${arguments.bestMove}

prompts.name: create-training-plan
prompts.description: Generate a personalized chess improvement plan
prompts.text: Create a chess training plan for ${arguments.level} level, focusing on ${arguments.weakness}, with ${arguments.timePerDay} minutes per day

prompts.name: build-repertoire
prompts.text: Build a ${arguments.style} opening repertoire for ${arguments.color} in ${arguments.timeControl} games

prompts.name: identify-patterns
prompts.description: Find recurring patterns in a position
prompts.text: Identify all chess patterns (tactical, positional, strategic) in position: ${arguments.fen}

prompts.name: start-study-session
prompts.description: Begin a focused chess study session
prompts.text: Start a ${arguments.duration}-minute focused study session on ${arguments.topic}
